mapper.sql: id, name, phone, id_card, bank_card, salary, department, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_employee (name, phone, id_card, bank_card, salary, department) VALUES ( #{name}, #{phone, typeHandler=com.example.demo.handler.EncryptTypeHandler}, #{idCard, typeHandler=com.example.demo.handler.EncryptTypeHandler}, #{bankCard, typeHandler=com.example.demo.handler.EncryptTypeHandler}, #{salary}, #{department} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_employee SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone, typeHandler=com.example.demo.handler.EncryptTypeHandler}, id_card = #{idCard, typeHandler=com.example.demo.handler.EncryptTypeHandler}, bank_card = #{bankCard, typeHandler=com.example.demo.handler.EncryptTypeHandler}, salary = #{salary}, department = #{department} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_employee WHERE department LIKE CONCAT('%', #{department}, '%')
